title: Cubic Nautilus Shell
description: Brings visual consistency with the new Nautilus Armor.
body:
**Refined Pots – Resource Pack**

**Makes consistency with the new Nautilus Armor.**
This pack redesigns the Nautilus Shell into a cubic style that matches the new armor, while keeping its original light beige color palette. Perfect for a cohesive oceanic aesthetic.

If you have any issues or ideas, visit my **[Discord Server](https://discord.gg/XRuZTuFFHR)**.
